name: Lacto: Cranberry Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, 3/4 cup of brown sugar, and butter; mix until crumbly. Reserving 1 1/2 cups of the crumb mixture, press the remainder firmly on the bottom of a greased 9x13 inch pan. Bake for 15 minutes. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth; stir in lemon juice. Spread evenly over the prepared crust. In another small bowl, combine remaining 1/4 cup of sugar and cornstarch; stir in cranberry sauce. Spoon evenly over the cheese layer. Top with the reserved crumb mixture. Bake for 40 minutes or until golden. Cool. Chill. Store covered in the refrigerator. Makes 24 bars.
